item.title: To the One That Took My Daughter
item.description: A case review from LordanArts on a daughter’s case and the investigation that led to its resolution.

media:content.media:description: A case review from LordanArts on a daughter’s case and the investigation that led to its resolution.

item.title: Case Cracked Using a Coffee Cup
item.description: A case is solved through a key clue tied to a coffee cup, showing how careful evidence review can help bring answers.

media:content.media:title: Case Cracked Using a Coffee Cup
media:content.media:description: A case is solved through a key clue tied to a coffee cup, showing how careful evidence review can help bring answers.

item.title: Search Ends for Brendan Thomas Santo
item.description: An update on the search for missing Brendan Thomas Santo, with attention to the case and the questions that remain.

media:content.media:title: Search Ends for Brendan Thomas Santo
media:content.media:description: An update on the search for missing Brendan Thomas Santo, with attention to the case and the questions that remain.

item.title: A Divorce Case That Turned Deadly
item.description: A case examining a marriage, a divorce request, and the investigation that followed.

media:content.media:title: A Divorce Case That Turned Deadly
media:content.media:description: A case examining a marriage, a divorce request, and the investigation that followed.
